name: Grandma's Best Plum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease bottom and sides of a 9 or 10 inch springform pan.
2. Mix together flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
3. Beat butter, sugar, and lemon zest together on medium speed until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, stirring well after each addition.
4. At low speed, beat the flour mixture into the butter mixture. Pour batter into prepared pan, spreading evenly.
5. Arrange plum halves with skin side up over the batter. Drizzle with lemon juice.
6. To prepare topping, mix sugar and cinnamon together in another small bowl. Sprinkle over the top of the cake.
7. Bake until golden brown, about 1 hour. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack for a few minutes.
